top_findings.summary: The skill's stated primary purpose is to "Generate client SDKs in multiple languages from OpenAPI specifications," which should involve reading an OpenAPI spec file and producing SDK code. However, the skill's instructions and output description go far beyond SDK generation, encompassing full API development (implementing endpoints, business logic, database integration, authentication, rate limiting, CI/CD, monitoring). It requires access to tools (Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, Bash) and performs actions (scaffolding entire applications, modifying source code, configuring databases and production environments) that are excessive and unrelated to the core task of generating client libraries from a specification.
